hero.subtitle: Custom-built tools and data-driven coaching services for athletes seeking maximum precision in training and competition.

tools.title: Analysis Tools
tools.power_guide: Cycling pacing simulator. Power optimization and strategy for competitions.
tools.route_analyzer: Tactical route analysis with weather data, segments, and physiological demand.
tools.hrv_compare: Real-time HRV sensor comparison. Recovery and variability tracking.
tools.cpet_report: Automated CPET reports and AI-powered metabolic threshold analysis.

about.label: The Founder
about.title: Luisma
about.bio_1: My approach combines cutting-edge exercise science with custom software development. I don't just analyze your data — I build the tools to interpret them better.
about.bio_2: With years of experience in both tech and endurance sports, my mission is to bridge the gap between data complexity and practical training execution.

services.title: Specialized Services
services.subtitle: Technology solutions and strategic consulting for businesses and professionals looking to harness the power of data and AI.
services.tools_desc: Development of dashboards, integrations, and automations tailored to your data and business operations needs.
services.consulting_desc: Personalized assessment of your current situation to provide the best Artificial Intelligence strategy applied to data analysis and business operations.

footer.tagline: Taking endurance training to the next level through rigorous data analysis and custom-built tools.

blog.subtitle: Deep dives into Heart Rate Variability, cycling performance metrics, and the future of data-driven endurance athletics.
